decisions.title: mem0-bridge is now the allowed OpenMemory compatibility seam
decisions.summary: The bridge keeps the `mem0-bridge` name for continuity but now documents retrieve-before-plan and store-after-gate against the flat Cursor OpenMemory runtime.

decisions.title: Lossless bridge proof is partial until the AI-PM ledger hook fires live
decisions.summary: Do not call the tri-workspace fully lossless-proven while the normal AI-PM ledger append can still fail to rotate/archive under policy.

patterns.title: Bridge promotion loop
patterns.summary: Search memory first, validate the packet, add one compact self-identifying memory, immediately re-search for discoverability, then mirror the proof into recovery/state docs.

patterns.title: Clean-room recovery proof
patterns.summary: A fresh verifier can recover objective, last action, blockers, and bridge status from charter + repo authority + one targeted OpenMemory search + AI-PM recovery bundle + STATE summary, without HANDOFF or ledger default reads.
